steps.title: Target estate discomfort
steps.content: The claim is that Professor Serebrakoff cannot adjust to living at the country estate. The strongest quotation must show his own negative reaction to that setting, not merely another character's opinion of him.

steps.title: Separate evidence from distractions
steps.content: A is Vanya criticizing him. B only says he lacks practical knowledge. D shows his fear of being alone with Vanya. The quotation about being used to libraries and lecture halls but now feeling trapped in the estate directly supports the claim. The answer is C.
